labels.winText: You found all words on this board.
labels.urlErrorText: The shared link is invalid or expired. Starting a new game.
labels.feedbackBtn: Submit feedback, feature request or incorrect word

classic.title: Standard
classic.ruleMinFindable: At least {count} words can be found

hide-word.title: Hide a word
hide-word.hint: Type one word with 4 to 10 letters.
hide-word.errorLength: Word length must be between 4 and 10.
hide-word.errorChars: Use only letters valid in the selected language.

enter-letters.title: Enter letters
enter-letters.hint: Click a cell or use arrow keys to navigate. Type to fill in letters.
enter-letters.errorChars: Use only letters valid in the selected language.
enter-letters.entryReadyNoWordsText: No words found on this board. Try different letters.

gameModes.name: Standard
gameModes.description: Swipe across adjacent letters to form words. The board is generated with a guaranteed set of findable words — from short 3-letter picks to longer high-scoring ones. Find them all to win.
gameModes.receivedDescription: You've been sent a word board! Swipe across adjacent letters to form words and find them all. Can you clear the board?

gameModes.name: Hide a word
gameModes.description: Type a secret word and share the board with a friend. Your word is hidden somewhere among the letters — they have to find it by swiping. They won't see the word until they discover it themselves.
gameModes.receivedDescription: Someone hid a secret word on this board just for you. Swipe across the letters and try to find it — it's in there somewhere!

gameModes.name: Enter letters
gameModes.description: Fill in all 16 cells with letters of your choice. Navigate with arrow keys or tap a cell, then type. When the board is complete, tap 'Find words' to discover what words are hidden — then solve the board.
gameModes.receivedDescription: Someone built a custom letter board for you. Find all the hidden words by swiping across adjacent letters.
